---
title: "thesis-mse"
author: ""
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: github_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

## Overview

This repository is the report-focused companion for the MSc thesis work on
tree-based decomposition of health inequalities. It contains Quarto reports,
supporting R scripts, and rendered outputs that can be shared more easily when
the project is made public.

## Current Scope

1. Maintain the report-writing and rendering workflow.
2. Keep reusable R scripts that support report generation.
3. Separate public-facing materials from local data objects and machine-
   specific files.

## Key Files

- `Decomposition_of_CI_Trees_MM.qmd` for the main report document.
- `Generate_DRC_Results_Objects.qmd` for generating report objects.
- `R/` for supporting analysis and helper scripts.
- `report/` for report materials.
- `docs/` for reference documents used during writing.

## Notes

- This README is intentionally brief and can be expanded later.
- Local data files and temporary build artifacts are excluded through
  `.gitignore`.
